description: Weekly rotating bakery menu showcase featuring new cake varieties and limited-time offerings with visual appeal and time-bound promotional urgency.
structural_recipe: Display rotating weekly menu items with clear product names (especially highlighting NEW launches). Use fire emojis and date ranges to create urgency (e.g., Feb 23-28). Feature product descriptions with sensory details (soft, golden, vanilla). Lead with an engaging hook about indulgence or special occasion relevance. Structure as numbered/bulleted menu list with visual product imagery. Include call-to-action through time scarcity messaging.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond to limited-time offerings and rotating menus that create FOMO and repeat-visit behavior. Weekly resets align with weekend social gatherings and celebrations. New product launches signal quality and innovation. Time-bound promotions (specific date ranges) drive immediate action. Festive emoji usage (🔥) conveys energy and desirability, matching local social media communication style.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure all product descriptions comply with halal certification visibility if claimed
Weekly rotation requires consistent content production capacity
Date ranges should align with Saudi work/weekend culture (Thu-Fri social peaks)
Avoid imagery that conflicts with religious or cultural sensitivities in presentation
cultural_constraints: Must respect Islamic dietary guidelines in product offerings
Timing promotions around Saudi holidays and local events (Founding Day, National Day, Ramadan)
